description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical ceramic vase with a slightly flared rim and a narrow base, decorated in a traditional blue and white palette. The surface features intricate hand-painted motifs, including birds, floral patterns, and architectural elements, interspersed with decorative borders and a central inscription reading 'minio'. The rim is thick and rounded, showing visible chips and wear, particularly a large break on one side. The body of the vase is adorned with alternating bands of foliage, scrollwork, and stylized scenes, giving it a rich, ornate appearance. The glaze is glossy, enhancing the vibrancy of the blue designs against the white background. This type of vase is reminiscent of European apothecary jars or decorative urns, often found in historical or classical urban settings.
description: A tall, ornate blue and white ceramic vase with hand-painted birds, floral motifs, and a central inscription, featuring a flared rim and visible chips. The glossy surface and intricate patterns evoke a classical, antique style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the inscription 'minio', flanked by blue birds and floral decorations, with the chipped rim clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting a decorative scene with architectural and plant motifs, and a continuation of the ornate border patterns.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a large floral and architectural motif, with less text and more emphasis on the decorative banding.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring additional floral and architectural elements, with visible scrollwork and part of the inscription wrapping around.
attribute_pattern: floral and architectural motifs with central inscription
